intent.content: The heading change between two temporally close contexts of the same vehicle is bounded.
intent.goal: Detect abrupt and physically implausible heading changes within a short time window for the same vehicle.
intent.design_rationale: A vehicle cannot change its direction drastically within a very short time interval; large heading differences between temporally close records of the same taxi indicate sensor noise or GPS errors.

semantics: For any two contexts v1 and v2, if they belong to the same vehicle and their timestamps are close (absolute time difference within a certain range), then the absolute heading difference between v1 and v2 does not exceed a certain bound.
